name: Ol' Dirty Bastard
bio: Ol' Dirty Bastard (Russell Tyrone Jones), also known as ODB, was one of the most unpredictable and charismatic members of the Wu-Tang Clan. His raw, unfiltered style and off-kilter vocal delivery made him one of hip-hop's most unique voices.
facts: His debut solo album 'Return to the 36 Chambers: The Dirty Version' is a cult classic.
Passed away on November 13, 2004, at the age of 35.
